title: Native Pi TUI worker packaging policy proof
goal: Prove and document that the native Pi TUI worker extension is loaded per attempt as a KD-prepared artifact and is not globally installed as a user-visible Pi extension.
acceptance: Document that package.json does not list extensions/khazad-worker in pi.extensions and that worker extension loading is per-attempt/embedded by KD.
Evidence includes generated run artifact examples for .herdr-tui.extension/index.js and .herdr-tui.command.json from a native TUI run.
Run and record package/release checks: npm pack --dry-run --json, cargo package --list, npm run check:extension, npm run test:extension, and cargo test -q tui_worker.
The proof document states what packaging policy proves and does not prove.
must_ask_if: The proof would require globally registering extensions/khazad-worker in package.json pi.extensions.
Packaging checks show the embedded worker extension source is absent from releasable artifacts.
